bullets.text: Q3 CR 97.4 including $430M in catastrophe losses (6.6 CR points) from Hurricanes Harvey and Irma — two of the largest storms in Progressive's history; YTD CR 94.2 remains healthy; NPW grew 18% YOY for the quarter.

Agency and Direct auto PIFs each up 11% YOY; Property PIFs up 16%; Robinson (auto+home bundle) PIF growth ~30% YOY with strong new business; all-time high trailing 12-month total auto PLE (+5% YOY) — retention at record levels.

Q3 NPW up 18% YOY; YTD NPW up 14%; Direct auto new applications up 25% in Q3 as advertising maintained; Commercial Lines new business volume strong, especially in September; YTD CR 94.2 with 14% premium growth.

Hurricane Harvey and Irma combined added 6.6 CR points; Property reinsurance limited Irma homeowners losses to $50M; 95% of Harvey and Irma vehicle claims closed at time of writing; property claims ~95% Harvey and ~70% Irma — ahead of industry pace.

Q3 investment return 1.1% FTE (equity +4.3%, fixed income +0.7%); YTD FTE return 4.2%; Fed expected to raise rates in December and three more times in 2018; Progressive positioned to benefit from rising reinvestment yields.

Snapshot mobile app rollout completed to 41 states plus D.C. by Q3 end; 11M+ trips and 116M miles collected via mobile app; over 50% of Direct channel new UBI customers using mobile app where available; Federal Motor Carrier UBI program launching December.

Commercial Lines new business applications only down 4% in Q3 (substantial improvement from -20% in Q2) as prior restrictions lifted and new segmentation improved competitiveness; ~9 points of commercial rate still earning into portfolio.

HomeQuote Explorer launched nationally (excluding FL, AK, HI) after successful Q1 pilot; HQX driving strong Robinson new business; Progressive Advantage Agency expanded; photo estimating in Claims mobile app approaching full countrywide rollout.

Nearly 1,300 catastrophe claims reservists deployed for Harvey and Irma response; Tricia and senior leadership visited Texas and Florida post-hurricane to observe claims operations firsthand; employee pride cited as defining cultural response to catastrophe season.

Platinum agent program showing continued growth in bundled Robinson volume; strong new business applications in September from Commercial Lines agency and direct channels; HQX expanded with online buy capability and improved mobile quoting.
